reviews.comment:
Es un lugar de paso, para cargar gasolina y tiene lugar para comprar sandwich, para comer una especie de camping. No se confíen en pagar con tarjeta de crédito o débito, siempre tienen problema de sistema

(Translated by Google)
It's a place to stop for gas and buy sandwiches, kind of like a campsite. Don't rely on paying with a credit or debit card; they always have system problems.

reviews.comment:
Es una estacion de servicio que parece un oasis luego de muchos kilometros sin nada mismo. Tienen agua caliente, comida, baño en buen estado, aceptan tarjeta de debito y credito. Es la unica estacion de servicio entre Ituzaingo e Itati. Tienen para calibrar las ruedas del auto y un pequeño parador para descansar. Buen lugar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station that feels like an oasis after many kilometers with nothing else. They have hot water, food, a clean bathroom, and accept debit and credit cards. It's the only gas station between Ituzaingó and Itatí. They have tire pressure checks and a small rest area. A good place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVbk4tUERREAE
